title: Fix stale doc comments across multiple files
description:
Several doc comments are stale after Sprint 44 changes and will mislead maintainers:
1. HtnTaskLibrary.cs line ~770: "Default plan: SearchMemory → MineBlock" should say "Default plan: MineBlock"
2. LlmChatInterpreter.cs line 19: "extract ChatInterpretation from IntentDraft response" should be "extract IntentDraft from LLM response"
3. LlmChatInterpreter.cs line 40: "removing ChatInterpretation" - past tense, mention it's done
4. ChatInterpreter.cs: duplicate old doc block about ChatInterpretation that predates Sprint 39 P1-C
5. Sprint44Tests.cs class doc: claims checkpoint tests exist that don't

Council confidence: 70%. Severity: Low (P2).
